title: Welcome to the Machine: On Writing About AI in Public
description: Why I'm starting a public blog about data science and GenAI — and what I hope to figure out by writing it.

title: Skills & Context Files for Coding Agents
description: A comprehensive guide to CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, DESIGN.md, GitHub Copilot instructions, and the emerging science of context engineering for AI coding tools.

title: SR 11-7 at fifteen: the guidance that built model risk management faces an AI reckoning
description: How a 2011 supervisory letter transformed banking's approach to model risk — and why generative AI, agentic systems, and prompt injection are straining its core assumptions.

title: Harness Design for Long-Running Agents
description: The orchestration layer that context files alone can't provide: context management, error recovery, checkpointing, security, and framework comparisons for production agents.

title: What 'Guardrail' Actually Means for Agentic AI in Finance
description: Everyone says 'guardrail.' Almost no one means the same thing. In an agentic system operating inside a bank, that ambiguity stops being academic.

title: Metrics, Metrics, Metrics
description: Everyone in GenAI wants a dashboard. The problem is that generic metrics aren't just uninformative — they actively mislead. Social scientists figured this out decades ago.
